WORDPRESS.name: Public blog content scan
WORDPRESS.description: Extract all published posts and pages from a public WordPress site — no authentication required

WORDPRESS.name: Blog-only content audit
WORDPRESS.description: Extract only blog posts (skip static pages) for content quality review

WORDPRESS.name: Authenticated full crawl with drafts
WORDPRESS.description: Scan all content including drafts using application password — useful for pre-publish compliance review

SLACK.name: Public channels compliance scan
SLACK.description: Scan all public channels for PII and secrets exposure using a bot token

SLACK.name: Private channels and DMs audit
SLACK.description: Audit private channels and direct messages for sensitive data using a user token

SLACK.name: Targeted channel scan with date range
SLACK.description: Scan specific channels within a time window — useful for incident response or focused audits

S3_COMPATIBLE_STORAGE.name: AWS S3 bucket scan
S3_COMPATIBLE_STORAGE.description: Scan an S3 bucket for document metadata and content previews using IAM credentials

S3_COMPATIBLE_STORAGE.name: MinIO document scan with prefix filter
S3_COMPATIBLE_STORAGE.description: Scan a MinIO bucket restricted to a key prefix and specific file types

AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE.name: Azure Blob container scan
AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE.description: Scan an Azure Blob container using connection string authentication

AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE.name: Azure Blob document compliance scan
AZURE_BLOB_STORAGE.description: Scan documents in a container with prefix filter, excluding images, with PII detection

GOOGLE_CLOUD_STORAGE.name: GCS bucket scan with ADC
GOOGLE_CLOUD_STORAGE.description: Scan all objects in a GCS bucket using Application Default Credentials

GOOGLE_CLOUD_STORAGE.name: GCS export folder PII scan
GOOGLE_CLOUD_STORAGE.description: Scan objects under a prefix with service account credentials and run PII detection

POSTGRESQL.name: Quick discovery scan
POSTGRESQL.description: Discover all tables across all schemas with random row sampling — works out of the box on any PostgreSQL instance

POSTGRESQL.name: All databases scan with latest sampling
POSTGRESQL.description: Enumerate all visible databases and prioritize recent rows — ideal for nightly data governance sweeps

POSTGRESQL.name: PII and secrets compliance scan
POSTGRESQL.description: Scan specific schemas for PII and hardcoded secrets — typical for pre-audit compliance checks

MYSQL.name: Quick discovery scan
MYSQL.description: Discover all tables in the server with random row sampling — works on any MySQL instance

MYSQL.name: All databases nightly governance scan
MYSQL.description: Scan all user databases (excluding system databases) with latest-row sampling for data governance

MYSQL.name: PII and secrets detection
MYSQL.description: Run PII and secrets detectors on all tables — useful for GDPR or SOC 2 readiness

MSSQL.name: Quick discovery scan
MSSQL.description: Discover all tables and views across the server with metadata extraction — works on any SQL Server instance

MSSQL.name: LDAP-authenticated full scan with lineage
MSSQL.description: Scan all databases using Active Directory authentication with full lineage and query analysis

ORACLE.name: Quick discovery scan
ORACLE.description: Discover all tables and views in the Oracle service with lineage — works with any standard Oracle setup

ORACLE.name: Targeted schema scan with latest sampling
ORACLE.description: Scan specific schema objects and prioritize latest rows — useful for monitoring active business schemas

HIVE.name: Quick discovery scan via LDAP
HIVE.description: Discover all tables and views in a Hive database using LDAP authentication

HIVE.name: All databases nightly scan
HIVE.description: Enumerate all Hive databases with latest-row sampling for data governance

DATABRICKS.name: Unity Catalog scan with PAT token
DATABRICKS.description: Discover all catalogs, schemas, and tables in Databricks Unity Catalog with table lineage enabled

DATABRICKS.name: Service principal with full metadata extraction
DATABRICKS.description: Production scan using service principal auth with lineage, notebooks, and pipeline metadata

DATABRICKS.name: Azure service principal with tenant-wide scan
DATABRICKS.description: Scan Azure Databricks workspace using Azure AD service principal authentication with catalog scope filtering

SNOWFLAKE.name: Password auth discovery scan
SNOWFLAKE.description: Discover all tables and views across the Snowflake account with lineage extraction

SNOWFLAKE.name: Key pair auth with scoped database
SNOWFLAKE.description: Scan a specific Snowflake database using key pair authentication — common for automated pipelines

MONGODB.name: Atlas cluster discovery scan
MONGODB.description: Discover all collections in a MongoDB Atlas cluster with random document sampling

MONGODB.name: On-prem MongoDB with latest-document sampling
MONGODB.description: Scan an on-prem MongoDB deployment prioritizing newest documents per collection

MONGODB.name: Atlas secrets detection scan
MONGODB.description: Scan all collections in Atlas for hardcoded secrets — catches API keys and tokens stored in documents

NEO4J.name: Local Neo4j discovery scan
NEO4J.description: Scan all node labels and relationships in a local Neo4j instance with basic auth

NEO4J.name: Neo4j Aura cloud scan
NEO4J.description: Scan specific node labels in a Neo4j Aura cloud instance over encrypted connection

NEO4J.name: Neo4j local dev (no auth)
NEO4J.description: Scan a local Neo4j dev instance without authentication — for development and testing

POWERBI.name: Service principal tenant-wide scan
POWERBI.description: Extract all Power BI workspaces, datasets, reports, and dashboards using service principal auth

POWERBI.name: Workspace-scoped scan with access token
POWERBI.description: Scan specific workspaces using a delegated access token — useful for team-level audits

TABLEAU.name: Tableau Cloud PAT scan
TABLEAU.description: Extract all workbooks and datasources from Tableau Cloud using personal access token

TABLEAU.name: Tableau Server project-scoped scan
TABLEAU.description: Scan specific projects on Tableau Server using username/password auth

CONFLUENCE.name: Engineering spaces content scan
CONFLUENCE.description: Ingest pages from specific Confluence spaces with comments and attachments for content governance

CONFLUENCE.name: Full knowledge base crawl with broken links
CONFLUENCE.description: Scan all current knowledge base spaces and check for broken links — weekly maintenance scan

JIRA.name: Project-scoped issue scan
JIRA.description: Ingest issues from specific Jira projects with comments and attachments

JIRA.name: Tenant-wide PII scan
JIRA.description: Scan all visible Jira issues for PII exposure — catches personal data in ticket descriptions and comments

SERVICEDESK.name: Service desk request scan
SERVICEDESK.description: Ingest customer requests from specific service desks with comments and attachments

SERVICEDESK.name: Tenant-wide PII compliance scan
SERVICEDESK.description: Scan all service desk requests for PII — catches customer personal data in support tickets

SQLITE.name: Local file scan
SQLITE.description: Scan all tables in a local SQLite database file with random sampling

SQLITE.name: Full table export
SQLITE.description: Read every row from selected tables in a SQLite database

NOTION.name: Internal integration workspace scan
NOTION.description: Scan all pages, data sources, and comments shared with an internal Notion integration using its token

NOTION.name: OAuth data-source compliance scan
NOTION.description: Scan specific Notion data sources via an OAuth access token and run PII and secrets detection

NOTION.name: Full workspace crawl with OCR
NOTION.description: Crawl every shared page with OCR enabled to extract text from PDF and image attachments, with PII detection

EMAIL.name: Gmail inbox compliance scan
EMAIL.description: Scan a Gmail inbox for PII and secrets in messages and attachments using an app password

EMAIL.name: Outlook / Microsoft 365 unread audit
EMAIL.description: Audit only unread Outlook messages received since a date for sensitive data

EMAIL.name: Corporate IMAP full mailbox scan
EMAIL.description: Scan every message across multiple folders on a self-hosted IMAP server

YOUTUBE.name: Brand channels transcript scan
YOUTUBE.description: Scan the latest videos from brand channels and run PII/secrets detection over English transcripts

YOUTUBE.name: Specific videos audit
YOUTUBE.description: Scan an explicit list of video URLs and process all of their transcripts

YOUTUBE.name: Random sampling via proxy
YOUTUBE.description: Randomly sample videos from a channel through a proxy to mitigate rate limiting
